calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Shannon Falk's motion to set aside the default judgment and default entered against her is granted. Ms. Falk has shown that she is entitled to the relief she seeks per CCP 473.5 since she did not receive actual notice of the service of the summons and complaint by publication prior to the date she was required to respond to the complaint. The motion is also strongly supported by the important public policy that cases should be decided on their merits. While there is no legal requirement that plaintiff's counsel notify Ms. Falk by email or a phone call that she was served by publication and thus required to respond to the complaint by a specific date, doing so would have been the wiser course and would possibly have eliminated the expense the parties have incurred for a prove-up hearing and this motion. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
